# Three.js vendored files

Version: `0.185.1`

Source: the official `three` npm package. Only the local modules required by the simulator are included:

- `three.module.min.js`
- `three.core.min.js`
- `addons/controls/OrbitControls.js`
- `addons/loaders/STLLoader.js`

See `LICENSE` for the MIT license text.
